summary: Comprehensive frontend-only E2E testing of SplitDash PWA. All critical flows work: name modal, demo items load, add/claim/remove item, tax/tip calculations, reset, customer edit, persistence (localStorage), PWA manifest+SW registration, and real-time cross-tab BroadcastChannel sync (add/tax/claim/reset all propagate). No console errors detected.

ui_bugs.issue: Validation error text never appears because the submit button is `disabled` when invalid, so clicking it is a no-op and `setTouched(true)` is never called. Error is only a visual hint gated on `touched && !valid`. Spec says 'Validation error appears for too-short inputs.' Consider triggering touched on blur or on attempted submit instead of disabling the button, or show error live while typing.

integration_issues.issue: `peers` increments on HELLO but never decrements when a peer tab closes. Observed '16 tabs' badge after a few test runs. Consider periodic heartbeat + prune, or a BYE message on unload.

action_items: Fix NameModal so the validation error surfaces on invalid submit attempts (remove disabled OR setTouched on click).
Make peer counter self-correcting (BYE on unload / heartbeat ping) so it does not drift upward.
critical_code_review_comments: App.jsx HELLO handler increments peers unconditionally — no decrement path ever runs, so the counter is monotonically increasing across the app session.
NameModal: disabled-button + touched-gated error creates an un-reachable error state; validation UX spec is not actually met.
useBroadcast returns a non-memoized `post` function rebuilt every render; it is used in a useEffect dependency which is fine today but could cause subtle re-runs later.
claimedAt comparison uses performance.timeOrigin+now() — works within same machine, but tiebreaker is already in place, so acceptable.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (12/13 spec items fully pass; 1 spec item - NameModal error visibility - partially met via disabled button)

seed_data_creation: None needed; app seeds 4 demo items by default.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use BASE URL from frontend/.env. App is frontend-only (no /api). Key testids are documented in the review_request. Multi-tab sync test must use context.new_page() on the same browser context (BroadcastChannel is same-origin/same-browser only). Note: localStorage persists across test runs — the peer counter may appear high; that is the drift bug, not a test artefact. To reset state cleanly, call `localStorage.clear()` via page.evaluate before testing.
rca of the issue: NameModal error-invisible: button has disabled={!valid}. Click handler never fires for invalid input → setTouched(true) never runs → error block stays hidden. Fix: either remove disabled and rely on submit() early-return which already calls setTouched, or call setTouched on input blur. Peer drift: HELLO handler does setPeers(p=>p+1) but no teardown message or heartbeat. Fix: broadcast BYE on 'pagehide'/'beforeunload' and decrement, or use periodic presence ping + stale pruning.
